ksa_text: Develop continuous monitoring measurement strategies, performance indicators, and automated reporting requirements for ongoing risk assessment.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-008 (Risk Management) scores 0.427 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Synthetic Data Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Synthetic Data Engineer.
